No Poverty.reason: The course analyzes 'aid diplomacy' (援助外交) and 'development aid' (援開發助), directly linking to Target 1.a on development cooperation and resource mobilization for poverty eradication.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: The course includes 'energy diplomacy' (能源外交) as a case study, which relates to Target 7.a on international cooperation for energy access and technology.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: Core focus on 'economic diplomacy', 'trade and investment strategy', and 'economic integration', all central to Target 8.1 (economic growth) and 8.3 (development-oriented policies).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: Focus on 'investment strategy' (投資戰略) and 'economic integration' (經濟整合) directly supports Target 9.1 and 9.a concerning infrastructure development and economic support for developing countries.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: Discusses 'aid diplomacy' (援助外交) and trade agreements (TPP, EPA), linking to Target 10.b (development assistance) and 10.a (special treatment for developing countries in trade).
